'''Bront''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="Cracken">''[[Cracken's Rebel Operatives]]''</ref> located within the [[Bront system/Legends|Bront system]], a part of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories']] [[Svivreni sector/Legends|Svivreni sector]].<ref name="EAOC" /> At some point by [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]],<ref name="Date">''[[Cracken's Rebel Operatives]]'' is set shortly after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates that battle to [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], while establishing it as the final event before the beginning of [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]].</ref> the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Graf Yonna]] and his family lived on Bront.<ref name="Cracken" />

During that [[Time/Legends|time]], the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] committed atrocities on Bront that led to the planet's [[Destruction of Bront|destruction]] as well as the [[Death/Legends|death]] of Yonna's family. The resultant [[Psychologist/Legends|psychological]] trauma caused Yonna to lose his sanity, and he assumed the personality of [[Parsol d'Ahndole]], an ancient adventurer and hero.<ref name="Cracken" />

==Behind the scenes==
Bront was created by [[Chuck Truett]] and mentioned in ''[[Cracken's Rebel Operatives]]'', a [[1994]] sourcebook for [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="Cracken" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Bront [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the planet Bront, in grid square O-19.<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref>
